name: Mastra Code
description: AI programming agent featuring observational memory and support for long-term coding sessions. Provides precise context management, rapid application building, and data compression for extended development work with workspace memory capabilities.

name: Superset
description: Full AI IDE that runs multiple coding assistants (Claude Code, Codex, etc.) simultaneously with independent sandboxing, unified monitoring, built-in diff viewer, and real-time notifications. Designed to reduce context switching and improve development efficiency by up to 10x.
community_quotes: 478 upvotes on Product Hunt and featured
Run multiple AI coding assistants simultaneously
Independent sandboxing prevents agent interference
Unified monitoring across all assistants

name: Happycapy
description: Browser-based cloud computer pre-loaded with Claude Code and other AI models. Provides 2 vCPU / 4GB RAM / 10GB SSD sandbox environment with no local installation required. Works on both desktop and mobile devices as an 'Agent-Native Computer for ordinary people'.
community_quotes: Topped Product Hunt weekly chart with 948 upvotes
Zero-barrier cloud-based agent workstation
No Docker setup or local installation needed

name: Base44 Backend Platform

Optimized for Claude Code and Cursor with one-command full-stack deployment via 'npx base44@latest create'.

name: Agent Bar
